\tzpentry{ID4379}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4379 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ S_p(\theta) = -\mathrm{Tr}\bigl(\rho_p^{(1)}(\theta) \log \rho_p^{(1)}(\theta) \bigr), \]
